_doc: S&P 500 constituents — the curated screener universe (expanded from SP100). Refresh via `python -m app.scripts.refresh_universe_lists` to pull the live FMP list. This starter file ships the SP100 + a strategic peer extension (foreign-listed ADRs + sub-industry semis) so the screener / comps work immediately without an FMP Premium key. Last refreshed: 2026-05-30.
_dual_class_policy: When a company has multiple share classes in the index (Alphabet GOOG/GOOGL, Berkshire BRK.A/BRK.B), we list only one ticker per company. Picked GOOGL (Class A, voting) and BRK.B (lower-priced, more retail-tradeable) as the canonical tickers.
_starter_note: This is a 163-ticker starter list (SP100 + 63 strategic extensions: foreign-listed ADRs + sub-industry semis + high-conviction large caps), NOT the full SP500. Run `python -m app.scripts.refresh_universe_lists` with FMP Premium to populate the remaining ~340 names. Until then, screener + comps work over this subset; lazy `analyzed_on_demand` loading covers any ticker the user researches directly.
